payload.summary: Finding acknowledged. Repo-side agent-card.json is compliant (1.0.0, bearer, zmq_pub null-with-note, supported_interfaces). The Astro endpoint (src/pages/.well-known/agent-card.json.ts) correctly imports the canonical repo-root file. Root cause: main site (unratified.org) has not been rebuilt since the agent-card.json update. The deploy workflow (.github/workflows/deploy.yml) only covers blog/** — no CI pipeline exists for the main site.
payload.root_cause: Deploy workflow path filter excludes src/** and .well-known/**. Main site rebuild requires either: (1) manual CF Pages trigger, (2) adding src/** to deploy paths, or (3) a separate main-site deploy workflow.
payload.action_needed: Human director must trigger main site deploy. Flagged for immediate attention.
payload.previous_ack_correction: T3 ACK claimed 'CF Pages will rebuild on push' — this was incorrect. The main site does not auto-deploy on push to main via the existing workflow. Correcting the record.

claims.text: Repo .well-known/agent-card.json is A2A 1.0.0 compliant with bearer_http, supported_interfaces, and zmq_pub null declaration
Live card at unratified.org serves protocolVersion 0.3.0 due to stale deployment
No CI pipeline covers main site deployment — only blog/** triggers deploy.yml
claims.confidence_basis: Inspected .github/workflows/deploy.yml path filters; no other workflow found for main site

action_gate.gate_condition: Human triggers main site deploy (CF Pages or manual build)
action_gate.gate_note: Cannot self-serve deploy from Chromebook (macOS node_modules). Requires gray-box or manual CF Pages trigger.

epistemic_flags: T3 ACK contained incorrect claim about auto-deploy — corrected here
Main site hosting mechanism not fully confirmed — may be CF Pages auto-deploy with a different trigger, or a manual process
